title: Global Oncology Market Report 2024
summary: Comprehensive analysis of the global oncology therapeutics market reaching $300B+
body: The global oncology market continues to expand driven by immunotherapy advances and precision medicine. Key growth areas include ADCs and bispecific antibodies.
author: WHAI Research

title: AI in Drug Discovery: State of Play
summary: How artificial intelligence is reshaping pharmaceutical R&D pipelines
body: AI-driven drug discovery is accelerating timelines from target identification to clinical candidates. Major pharma companies are investing heavily in ML platforms.
author: Sarah Mitchell

title: Digital Health Funding Q1 2024
summary: Quarterly overview of digital health venture funding and M&A activity
body: Digital health funding reached $3.2B in Q1 2024 marking a stabilization after the 2022-2023 correction. Telehealth and AI diagnostics lead deal volume.
author: WHAI Data Team

title: mRNA Therapeutics Beyond Vaccines
summary: The expanding frontier of mRNA technology into oncology and rare diseases
body: Following COVID-19 vaccine success mRNA platforms are being developed for cancer vaccines personalized neoantigen therapies and rare genetic disorders.
author: Dr. James Ward

title: Healthcare M&A Outlook 2024
summary: Strategic review of healthcare mergers and acquisitions trends
body: Healthcare M&A activity is rebounding with pharma companies pursuing bolt-on acquisitions in oncology and rare disease. PE activity remains strong in health IT.
author: WHAI Research

title: Precision Medicine Data Infrastructure
summary: Building the data backbone for precision medicine at scale
body: Healthcare systems are investing in genomic data infrastructure interoperability standards and clinical decision support systems powered by real-world evidence.
author: Elena Rodriguez

title: GLP-1 Market Disruption Report
summary: How GLP-1 receptor agonists are reshaping cardiometabolic care
body: The GLP-1 market is projected to exceed $100B by 2030 with expanding indications beyond diabetes into obesity NASH and cardiovascular risk reduction.
author: WHAI Research

title: Biotech IPO Window Analysis
summary: Analysis of biotech IPO market conditions and pipeline companies
body: The biotech IPO window has reopened with improved market conditions. Companies with differentiated platforms and Phase 2+ data are finding investor appetite.
